violations.claim: REACHABLE: indexOf returns -1 for anonymous node, loop skips all siblings
violations.smt2:
; REACHABLE: indexOf returns -1 for anonymous node, loop skips all siblings
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 255
(declare-const current_is_named Int)      ; 1 = current is a named tree-sitter node
(declare-const my_index Int)              ; result of siblings.indexOf(current)
(declare-const num_guard_siblings Int)    ; count of earlier if_statement siblings
(declare-const guards_added Int)          ; count of early-return conditions added

; Code transition: namedChildren contains only named nodes
; anonymous current => indexOf returns -1
(assert (= current_is_named 0))
(assert (=> (= current_is_named 0) (= my_index -1)))

; Code transition: loop runs for i = 0; i < my_index — when my_index = -1, 0 iterations
(assert (>= num_guard_siblings 1))
(assert (=> (= my_index -1) (= guards_added 0)))

; Violation: guard conditions exist but are never added
(assert (= my_index -1))
(assert (> num_guard_siblings 0))
(assert (= guards_added 0))
(check-sat)
